message:
feat(freeze): Add general call opcode with argc operand

Adds support for the `call` opcode that uses a u16 argc operand
(unlike call0-3 which have implicit arg count).

- Added call to emitInstruction() with dynamic arg count
- Added call to emitTrampolineInstruction()
- Updated is_call_opcode check to include .call
- Updated call_argc switch to handle .call operand
- Added call (size=3, pop=1, push=1) to verify_opcodes.zig
